title: Making Sugar from Beets│甜菜製糖
description: Sugar can be crafted from beetroot.│甜菜根可以用來合成糖。
body:
# Function│功能
1. Beetroots can be crafted into sugar using a crafting table.│使用工作台可以將甜菜根製作成糖。
2. Due to a conflict with the original red dye recipe, beetroots now require a furnace to be crafted into red dye.│由於與原來的紅色染料配方衝突，現在要將甜菜根製成紅色染料需要使用熔爐。

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**
